question: Which of the following statements about the average temperature data shown on the map is most accurate?

options.A: Some regions shown on the map have no reported temperature data.
options.B: Brazil clearly has the lowest average temperature on the map.
options.C: All regions on the map have reported temperature data.
options.D: Australia clearly has the lowest average temperature on the map.

explanation: At least one of the labelled regions appears grey, indicating missing data rather than a true zero or low value. Because we do not know that region's value, we cannot safely say which labelled region truly has the lowest value.
